hero.headline: Stop Wasting Leads on a Broken System.
hero.subhead: I build the revenue engine your team can actually run. Using a 22-point structural diagnostic, I help you find the friction hiding in plain sight, fix what matters first, and move from scattered activity to an orchestrated system.

ideology.title: Five Stages. One Unified Engine.
ideology.subtitle: Stop optimizing isolated tactics. I help you align your entire buyer journey into one coherent system that captures 12+ real-time signals across every stage.

stages.title: Awareness
stages.description: Bridge the gap between unknown and found. Get discovered by high-intent buyers before they ever talk to sales.

stages.title: Consideration
stages.description: Replace 'lazy design' with visual proof. Make it effortless for buyers to evaluate your approach and trust your process.

stages.title: Decision
stages.description: Remove the friction that stalls 70% of deals. Clear trust anchors and answering objections before they're asked.

stages.title: Conversion
stages.description: Turn signed deals into momentum. Smooth handoffs and behavior-based onboarding that protects the relationship.

stages.title: Retention
stages.description: Scale via system, not heroics. Surface risks early and grow accounts through orchestrated customer health signals.

about.title: Your Guide
about.name: Richard Norwood, PMP
about.bio: I help leaders find the commercial friction that hides in plain sight. My approach to revenue systems is rooted in managing businesses as metrics—turning invisible leaks into visible, governable outcomes. As a certified Project Management Professional (PMP), I bring the delivery discipline required to transition a fragmented journey into a unified commercial engine.
